title: New NERV and SEELE logos confirmed
display_title: New NERV and SEELE logos confirmed
wikitext:
[]: New NERV and SEELE logos confirmed             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Fri Apr 13, 2007 10:29 pm It's from Famitsu. I doubt it's fabricated. I couldn't find any other thread about the logos, so just merge/lock/whatever into an appropriate thread.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Apr 13, 2007 10:55 pm Those bites taken out of the apple are amazingly angular.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sat Apr 14, 2007 1:03 am though the apple looks somewhat strange, it looks very nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Sat Apr 14, 2007 4:17 am NERV's logo is ugly and too barroque. Has the apple been bitten or peeled? Seele's logo is like they are screaming "Hey! We are bad! Really! Can't you see!" PS: In Evangelion's official site, the apple behing NERV's leaf only appears from time to time, shining...

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:52 am No one in their right mind would approve a logo so unnecessarily complicated. Damn you, nonsensical fiction.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Apr 14, 2007 9:55 am That's just bad graphic communication. Stop trying to fix what ain't broken. Also, threadtitle is terribly misleading.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sat Apr 14, 2007 10:15 am Yeah. I prefer the old designs better, as well. I wonder, is there anyone who can read German here? What does SEELE's new logo translate into?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Apr 14, 2007 10:49 am "Above the starry canopy." "God judges as we judged."

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Apr 14, 2007 11:49 am The SEELE logo would be better if the snake didn't look so "scary."

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Apr 14, 2007 12:27 pm these suck. Go back and try again.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Apr 14, 2007 12:39 pm Wah wah wah, bitch moan whine etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 14, 2007 12:57 pm What do you want us to do? Praise them?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Apr 14, 2007 1:06 pm Reichu wrote: What do you want us to do? Praise them?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Apr 14, 2007 1:58 pm Guess I'm in the minority. I like them both. I did like the original NERV logo more but the new one isn't bad at all and I'm glad some concrete images and facts are coming out now. So IMO, two thumbs up for both.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Apr 14, 2007 2:03 pm I like the nerv logo but seele....uhh...someone needs to eat that apple....

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Apr 14, 2007 2:17 pm I'm wondering what the symbolism is behind them. The original NERV symbol was showing that mankind abandoned original sin (the fig leafs that covered Adam and Eve) and the Seele symbol was the seven eyes of God, which, I guess, meant that they see all. I guess the new symbols mean the same thing?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Apr 14, 2007 4:11 pm The new Seele logo looks kind of boring, bland, non-threatening(maybe that's what they want you to think :evil: ), I prefer the original for now. The new NERV looks weird with its random angles; but, it's growing on me though.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Apr 14, 2007 4:24 pm I don't like the SEELE one at all. It looks like something some emo-kid would draw in high school. And the new Nerv one isn't much better. Too complicated.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Sat Apr 14, 2007 5:10 pm I think that SEELE's logo is a bit too elaborate. If it were any more complicated it'd be a coat of arms. Plus, the writing's in German. SEELE is alienating a huge percentage of its customer base. But who ever said that a global conspiracy of rapture-minded, cyborgian scientists had to be appealing? If it's only the members of SEELE seeing it, it doesn't necessarily have to be cool enough to put on a trucker hat. On the other hand, it might be a good move to go with something little more unembellished. I'm thinking some kind of "swooshing" image, if that hasn't been taken.

[]: Re: New NERV and SEELE logos confirmed             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Apr 14, 2007 5:34 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote:
